composites.name: steady-state
composites.description: Tellurium / Antimony steady-state solver: computes equilibrium concentrations for a model using RoadRunner's steadyState(). Emits the steady-state species map as 'concentrations'.

model.default:
model decay
  S1 = 10; S2 = 0
  S1 -> S2; k*S1; k = 0.3
end

composites.name: decay-with-viz
composites.description: Tellurium decay demo with a wired Visualization Step. Each update produces a Plotly HTML figure of the running species trajectories, written to the 'viz_html' store.

interval.description: Process interval in model time units.

viz_title.description: Title displayed at the top of the Plotly figure.

composites.name: decay-demo
composites.description: Tiny Tellurium / Antimony decay demo: S1 -> S2 first-order kinetics. Emits species concentrations, reaction rates, and time each step.

interval.description: Process interval in model time units. Each update advances RoadRunner by this much.

k_decay.description: First-order decay rate constant for S1 -> S2.
